unverifiedItems.claim: Commerce NodeController constructor missing assignment for _changeApplicationPriceTypeHandler -> guaranteed NRE on PUT /api/Node/application/price-type
unverifiedItems.resolution: Real defect is the method-name overload at NodeController.cs:194,212 (two methods both named ChangeCommunicationChannelPriceType). Tracked as GAP-007 (MED), not HIGH-NRE.

unverifiedItems.phase2Verification: Confirmed via Grep across the active frontend tree — zero call sites match 'templates/' or 'communication-channel-configs'.
unverifiedItems.status: VERIFIED — but underlying intent (east-west-only vs stale route map) is still UNVERIFIED until Ammar confirms
unverifiedItems.resolution: Tracked as Q5 in BLOCKERS_AND_QUESTIONS.md and GAP-008 in GAP_LIST.md.

unverifiedItems.phase2Verification: Per ARCHITECTURE_RULES.md section 4.1: Access (PES) has 'not found' — only 8 of 9 services define ServiceOperationResult<T>.

unverifiedItems.resolution: Access uses different response shapes (PES authorize-resources returns PesAuthorizeResourcesResponse directly). Not a HIGH issue but worth noting.
